title: StageAgentOutput
description: Required stage-aware response shape after parsing. Keys align with the staged agent configs used by the production content quality pipeline.

resumo.description: 2-3 sentence summary of the stage output

self_check.description: Bullet list validating the artifact against the stage contract and acceptance criteria

next_gate.description: Human gate to advance to on success

blocker_question.description: Optional clarification question when the stage cannot complete
